title: Entity Cleaner
description: Cleans up unwanted entities automatically to improve server performance. Safely removes items, arrows, XP orbs, projectiles, and other leftover entities while keeping farms and important structures intact.
body:
This standalone datapack/mod is a powerful upgrade verison to the original [Lag Sweeper](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lagsweeper-datapack), designed to work seamlessly across multiple Minecraft versions. It efficiently clears a wide range of entities, including dropped items, eggs, snow, arrows, shulker bullets, wither skulls, and more, reducing lag and keeping your world running smoothly.

# Key Features:
- Multi-version compatibility – Works reliably on different Minecraft versions without errors.
- Comprehensive entity cleanup – Removes common lag-causing entities automatically (Every 5min).
- Lightweight and easy to use – Install and run without affecting gameplay performance.
- Optimized for servers and singleplayer – Keeps both worlds and servers smooth, even with high entity counts.

# **Multiplayer Support / SinglePlayer Support**
- Added toggle notification.
- Added toggle mod/datapack.
- Added toggle entity.
- To get Op Run `tag @s add ec_operator`
- To mute sendCommandFeedback Run `/gamerule sendCommandFeedback false` or `/gamerule send_command_feedback false` or [Download↗](https://modrinth.com/datapack/command-feedback)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/86prO8jZnvM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![A demo image of config menu of datapack/plugin (Entity Cleaner)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd8fe976572e674f9c7d1bc3da1bb473fd46adce.png)

If you notice any missing entities or any error related to version, feel free to DM [Planet Minecraft ↗](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bibekthelegend/)!
